text: For CCL, train services will end at 10pm on four Sundays - Oct 15, 22, 29 and Nov 5. One platform each at Telok Blangah and HarbourFront stations will be temporarily closed from Jan 20 to May 24, 2024. A shuttle train will operate on the other platform between HarbourFront and Labrador Park stations at 10-minute intervals, and peak-hour waiting times between Kent Ridge and Labrador Park are expected to be about five minutes.
